reason: The item cleanly tests boundary-aware mechanistic inference (inert dilution + combustion energy) versus common overreaches (universality claims and linear vent-sizing extrapolation), yielding strong diagnostic separation for experts. Decoys are largely single-fault and engineering-plausible, though some options use absolute language (“always/under all”) that can become a stylistic tell and slightly reduce neutrality. Overall, it effectively penalizes unwarranted generalization while keeping the cognitive target coherent.
